<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# The light green square is at middle-right [40:41, 12:13]
# The initial position was middle-center [40:41, 10:11]
# Let me try moving it LEFT to restore the initial position

predict(expect_change=True, note='Move light green LEFT to middle-center')
action(['LEFT'])

seg = current_frame.segmentation
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'N':
        b = n['boundary']
        r0, r1 = min(p[0] for p in b), max(p[0] for p in b)
        c0, c1 = min(p[1] for p in b), max(p[1] for p in b)
        print(f"Light green: [{r0}:{r1},{c0}:{c1}]")

print(f"Level completed: {last_action_result.get('level_completed', False)}")

# Try one more LEFT to get to middle-center
if not last_action_result.get('level_completed', False):
    predict(expect_change=True, note='Move light green LEFT to middle-center')
    action(['LEFT'])
    
    seg2 = current_frame.segmentation
    for n in seg2['nodes']:
        if n['color'] == 'N':
            b = n['boundary']
            r0, r1 = min(p[0] for p in b), max(p[0] for p in b)
            c0, c1 = min(p[1] for p in b), max(p[1] for p in b)
            print(f"Light green: [{r0}:{r1},{c0}:{c1}]")
    
    print(f"Level completed: {last_action_result.get('level_completed', False)}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
